name: Sourdough Starter
recipeInstructions:
DO NOT USE ANY METAL UTENSILS WITH THIS STARTER!!
In a 2 quart glass bowl, mix the yeast and warm water; let stand for 10 minutes.
Add flour, mixing until a thick batter forms. It won't be smooth.
Cover with plastic wrap and let stand in a warm place for 2 - 3 days.
Stir daily until a sour smell forms.
